contents:
(** The Cayley-Dickson Construction *)

(** The Cayley-Dickson construction in homotopy type theory due to Buchholtz and Rijke https://arxiv.org/abs/1610.01134 is a method to construct an H-space structure on the join of two suspensions of a type [A]. As a special case, this gives a way to construct an H-space structure on [S^3] leading to the quaternionic Hopf fibration.

The construction works by replicating the classical Cayley-Dickson construction on convolution algebras ([*]-algebras), which can produce the complex numbers, quaternions, octonions, etc. starting with the real numbers. We cannot replicate this directly in HoTT since such algebras have a contractible underlying vector space, therefore the construction here attempts to axiomatize the properties of the units of those algebras instead.

This is done by postulating a structure called a "Cayley-Dickson imaginaroid" on a type [A] and showing that [Join (Susp A) (Susp A)] is an H-space. An open problem is to show that this space itself is also an imaginaroid given further, yet unspecified, coherences on [A]. *)

(** ** Cayley-Dickson spheroids *)

(** A Cayley-Dickson Spheroid is a pointed type X which is an H-space, with two operations called negation and conjugation, satisfying the following seven laws:
  1. [--x = x]
  2. [x** = x]
  3. [1* = 1]
  4. [(-x)* = -x*]
  5. [x(-y) = -(xy)]
  6. [(xy)* = y* x*]
  7. [x* x = 1]
Note that the above laws are written in pseudocode since we cannot define multiplication by juxtaposition in Coq, and * is used to denote conjugation. *)

Local Instance isequiv_cds_conjug : IsEquiv cds_conjug
    := isequiv_adjointify cds_conjug cds_conjug cds_conjug_inv cds_conjug_inv.

goals.conclusion: FactorNegLeft negate sg_op
FactorNegLeft negate sg_op
conj (- x * y) = conj (- (x * y))
conj y * conj (- x) = conj (- (x * y))
conj y * conj (- x) = - conj (x * y)
conj y * conj (- x) = - (conj y * conj x)
conj y * conj (- x) = conj y * - conj x
conj (- x) = - conj x
RightInverse sg_op cds_conjug 1
RightInverse sg_op cds_conjug 1
x * cds_conjug x = 1
cds_conjug (cds_conjug x) * conj x = 1

contents:
Instance conjugate_susp (A : Type) `(Negate A) : Conjugate (Susp A)
  := functor_susp (-).

Instance negate_susp (A : Type) `(Negate A) : Negate (Susp A)
  := susp_neg _ o conjugate_susp A (-).

Instance swapop_conjugate_susp {A} `(Negate A)
  : SwapOp (negate_susp A (-)) (conjugate_susp A (-)).

goals.conclusion: SwapOp (negate_susp A negate) (conjugate_susp A negate)
SwapOp (negate_susp A negate) (conjugate_susp A negate)
conj (- x) = - conj x
- conj x = conj (- x)

contents: (** [conjugate_susp A] is involutive, since any functor applied to an involution gives an involution. *)

goals.conclusion: Involutive (conjugate_susp A negate)
Involutive (conjugate_susp A negate)
conjugate_susp A negate (conjugate_susp A negate x) = x
functor_susp (fun x0 : A => - - x0) x = x
functor_susp (fun x0 : A => - - x0) x = functor_susp idmap x
(fun x0 : A => - - x0) == idmap

contents: (** [conjugate_susp A] is involutive as any composite of commuting involutions is an involution. *)

goals.conclusion: Involutive (negate_susp A negate)
Involutive (negate_susp A negate)
negate_susp A negate (negate_susp A negate x) = x

susp_neg A (conjugate_susp A negate (susp_neg A (conjugate_susp A negate x))) =
x
conjugate_susp A negate (susp_neg A (conjugate_susp A negate x)) = ?Goal
susp_neg A ?Goal = x
susp_neg A (- conj x) = x
conjugate_susp A negate (conj x) = x

contents:
Instance isunitpreserving_conjugate_susp {A} `(CayleyDicksonImaginaroid A)
  : @IsUnitPreserving _ _ pt pt (conjugate_susp A cdi_negate)
  := idpath.
(** Every suspension of a Cayley-Dickson imaginaroid gives a Cayley-Dickson spheroid. *)

Instance cdi_conjugate_susp_left_inverse {A} `(CayleyDicksonImaginaroid A)
  : LeftInverse hspace_op (conjugate_susp A cdi_negate) mon_unit.

goals.conclusion: LeftInverse hspace_op (conjugate_susp A cdi_negate) 1
LeftInverse hspace_op (conjugate_susp A cdi_negate) 1

contents:
Instance cdi_conjugate_susp_right_inverse {A} `(CayleyDicksonImaginaroid A)
  : RightInverse hspace_op (conjugate_susp A cdi_negate) mon_unit.

goals.conclusion: RightInverse hspace_op (conjugate_susp A cdi_negate) 1
RightInverse hspace_op (conjugate_susp A cdi_negate) 1

contents:
Instance cdi_susp_left_identity {A} `(CayleyDicksonImaginaroid A)
  : LeftIdentity hspace_op mon_unit
  := _.

Instance cdi_susp_right_identity {A} `(CayleyDicksonImaginaroid A)
  : RightIdentity hspace_op mon_unit
  := _.

Instance cdi_negate_susp_factornegleft {A} `(CayleyDicksonImaginaroid A)
  : FactorNegLeft (negate_susp A cdi_negate) hspace_op.

goals.conclusion: FactorNegLeft (negate_susp A cdi_negate) hspace_op
FactorNegLeft (negate_susp A cdi_negate) hspace_op

contents: (** A Cayley-Dickson imaginaroid [A] whose multiplication on the suspension is associative gives rise to an H-space structure on the join of the suspension of [A] with itself. *)
(** Let [A] be a Cayley-Dickson imaginaroid with associative H-space multiplication on [Susp A]. *)
(** Declaring these as local instances so that they can be found *)
Local Instance hspace_op' : SgOp (Susp A) := hspace_op.
Local Instance hspace_unit' : MonUnit (Susp A) := hspace_mon_unit.
(** First we make some observations with the context we have. *)
Context (a b c d : Susp A).
Local Definition g := (fun y => c * (y * b)).
Lemma lemma1 : f (- mon_unit) = a * c.
Lemma lemma2 : f (conj c * conj a * d * conj b) = (-d) * conj b.

goals.conclusion: f (conj c * conj a * d * conj b) = - d * conj b
f (conj c * conj a * d * conj b) = - d * conj b
a * (c * - (conj c * conj a * d * conj b)) = - d * conj b
- (a * (c * (conj c * conj a * d * conj b))) = - d * conj b
- (a * c * (conj c * conj a) * d * conj b) = - d * conj b
- (a * c * conj (a * c) * d * conj b) = - d * conj b
- (1 * d * conj b) = - d * conj b
- (d * conj b) = - d * conj b
- d * conj b = - (d * conj b)

contents: Lemma lemma3 : g mon_unit = c * b.

goals.conclusion: g 1 = c * b
g 1 = c * b
1 * b = b

contents: Lemma lemma4 : g (conj c * conj a * d * conj b) = conj a * d.

g (conj c * conj a * d * conj b) = conj a * d
c * (conj c * conj a * d * conj b * b) = conj a * d

c * (conj c * conj a * d) * (conj b * b) = conj a * d
c * (conj c * conj a * d) * 1 = conj a * d
c * (conj c * conj a * d) = conj a * d
c * conj c * conj a * d = conj a * d
1 * conj a * d = conj a * d
1 * (conj a * d) = conj a * d

                    (jglue (f (conj c0 * conj a0 * d0 * conj b0)) s)^)
                 (internal_paths_rew
                    (fun s : Susp A =>
                     PathSquare (jglue (f (- mon_unit)) (g mon_unit))
                       (jglue (f (conj c0 * conj a0 * d0 * conj b0)) s)^
                       (jglue (f (- mon_unit)) s)
                       (jglue (f (conj c0 * conj a0 * d0 * conj b0))
                          (g mon_unit))^)
                    (sq_GGGG
                       (Join_rec_beta_jglue (fun a1 : Susp A => joinl (f a1))
                          (fun b1 : Susp A => joinr (g b1))
                          (fun a1 b1 : Susp A => jglue (f a1) (g b1))
                          (- mon_unit) mon_unit)
                       (ap inverse
                          (Join_rec_beta_jglue
                             (fun a1 : Susp A => joinl (f a1))
                             (fun b1 : Susp A => joinr (g b1))
                             (fun a1 b1 : Susp A => jglue (f a1) (g b1))
                             (conj c0 * conj a0 * d0 * conj b0)
                             (conj c0 * conj a0 * d0 * conj b0)))
                       (Join_rec_beta_jglue (fun a1 : Susp A => joinl (f a1))
                          (fun b1 : Susp A => joinr (g b1))
                          (fun a1 b1 : Susp A => jglue (f a1) (g b1))
                          (- mon_unit) (conj c0 * conj a0 * d0 * conj b0))
                       (ap inverse
                          (Join_rec_beta_jglue
                             (fun a1 : Susp A => joinl (f a1))
                             (fun b1 : Susp A => joinr (g b1))
                             (fun a1 b1 : Susp A => jglue (f a1) (g b1))
                             (conj c0 * conj a0 * d0 * conj b0) mon_unit))
                       (sq_cGcG
                          (ap_V
                             (Join_rec (fun a1 : Susp A => joinl (f a1))
                                (fun b1 : Susp A => joinr (g b1))
                                (fun a1 b1 : Susp A => jglue (f a1) (g b1)))
                             (jglue (conj c0 * conj a0 * d0 * conj b0)
                                (conj c0 * conj a0 * d0 * conj b0)))
                          (ap_V
                             (Join_rec (fun a1 : Susp A => joinl (f a1))
                                (fun b1 : Susp A => joinr (g b1))
                                (fun a1 b1 : Susp A => jglue (f a1) (g b1)))
                             (jglue (conj c0 * conj a0 * d0 * conj b0)
                                mon_unit))
                          (sq_ap
                             (Join_rec (fun a1 : Susp A => joinl (f a1))
                                (fun b1 : Susp A => joinr (g b1))
                                (fun a1 b1 : Susp A => jglue (f a1) (g b1)))
                             (Susp_ind
                                (fun y : Susp A =>
                                 Diamond (- mon_unit) y mon_unit y)
                                (diamond_v_sq (- mon_unit) North 1
                                 :
                                 (fun y : Susp A =>
                                  Diamond (- mon_unit) y mon_unit y) North)
                                (diamond_h_sq mon_unit South 1
                                 :
                                 (fun y : Susp A =>
                                  Diamond (- mon_unit) y mon_unit y) South)
                                ((fun a1 : A => diamond_twist (merid a1))
                                 :
                                 forall x : A,
                                 transport
                                   (fun y : Susp A =>
                                    Diamond (- mon_unit) y mon_unit y)
                                   (merid x)
                                   (diamond_v_sq (- mon_unit) North 1
                                    :
                                    (fun y : Susp A =>
                                     Diamond (- mon_unit) y mon_unit y) North) =
                                 (diamond_h_sq mon_unit South 1
                                  :
                                  (fun y : Susp A =>
                                   Diamond (- mon_unit) y mon_unit y) South))
                                (conj c0 * conj a0 * d0 * conj b0)))))
                    (lemma4 a0 b0 c0 d0))
                 (lemma3 b0 c0))
              (lemma2 a0 b0 c0 d0))
           (lemma1 a0 c0)))^
     :
     (fun a1 c1 d1 : psusp A => jglue (a1 * c1) (conj a1 * d1)) a0 c0 d0 @
     (fun d1 a1 b1 : psusp A => (jglue (- d1 * conj b1) (conj a1 * d1))^) d0
       a0 b0 =
     (fun c1 a1 b1 : psusp A => jglue (a1 * c1) (c1 * b1)) c0 a0 b0 @
     (fun b1 c1 d1 : psusp A => (jglue (- d1 * conj b1) (c1 * b1))^) b0 c0 d0)
      a b c d @
    (whiskerL ((fun c0 a0 b0 : psusp A => jglue (a0 * c0) (c0 * b0)) c a b)
       (Join_rec_beta_jglue ((fun a0 b0 : psusp A => joinr (b0 * a0)) b)
          ((fun a0 b0 : psusp A => joinl (- b0 * conj a0)) b)
          ((fun b0 c0 d0 : psusp A => (jglue (- d0 * conj b0) (c0 * b0))^) b)
          c d))^)
   :
   ap
     (fun x : Join (psusp A) (psusp A) =>
      (fun a0 : psusp A =>
       Join_rec ((fun a1 b0 : psusp A => joinl (a1 * b0)) a0)
         ((fun a1 b0 : psusp A => joinr (conj a1 * b0)) a0)
         ((fun a1 c0 d0 : psusp A => jglue (a1 * c0) (conj a1 * d0)) a0) x)
        a)
     (jglue c d) @
   (fun d0 : psusp A =>
    (fun d1 a0 b0 : psusp A => (jglue (- d1 * conj b0) (conj a0 * d1))^) d0 a
      b)
     d =
   (fun c0 : psusp A =>
    (fun c1 a0 b0 : psusp A => jglue (a0 * c1) (c1 * b0)) c0 a b) c @
   ap
     (fun x : Join (psusp A) (psusp A) =>
      (fun b0 : psusp A =>
       Join_rec ((fun a0 b1 : psusp A => joinr (b1 * a0)) b0)
         ((fun a0 b1 : psusp A => joinl (- b1 * conj a0)) b0)
         ((fun b1 c0 d0 : psusp A => (jglue (- d0 * conj b1) (c0 * b1))^) b0)
         x)
        b)
     (jglue c d))
  pt @
ap joinr (hspace_left_identity b) =
ap joinl (hspace_right_identity a) @ jglue a b

ap joinl (hspace_right_identity a) @ jglue a b =
jglue (a * pt) (pt * b) @ ap joinr (hspace_left_identity b)
